name: ddeq
summary: Algorithms for data-driven detection and quantification of hot spot emissions in satellite observations.
author: Laia Amorós, Grégoire Broquet, Dominik Brunner, Frédéric Chevallier, Janne Hakkarainen, Erik Koene, Gerrit Kuhlmann, Sandro Meier, Janne Nurmela, Diego Santaren, Johanna Tamminen
